word: G659 - ἀποτίθημι - apotíthēmi - ap-ot-eeth'-ay-mee - Cast off

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀποτίθημι

- Transliteration: Apotithemi

- Phonetic: ap-ot-eeth'-ay-mee

- Definition:

1. to put off or aside or away

- Origin: from G575 and G5087

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G575 and G5087; to put away (literally or figuratively): - cast off lay apart (aside down) put away (off).
